rationale: BUG-2659 root cause: the Skill tool rejects ALL invocations when this flag is set, including user-typed `/ll:` slash commands. The audit-issue-conflicts skill had no CLI wrapper or other dispatch path, so the flag made it entirely unreachable.
rule: Never set `disable-model-invocation: true` on a skill that has no alternate user-reachable entry point (CLI wrapper, par
